revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Cintamani); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:00, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1210497662 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:00, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Hinduism|importance=Low}} {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=Low}} }} ==Untitled== ''The following appears to be uncited, possibly OR, so moved to talk'' [[User:RJFJR|RJFJR]] ([[User talk:RJFJR|talk]]) 19:08, 17 October 2009 (UTC) Importantly, we now know that crystals are [[Crystal oscillator|resonant substances]] and resonance is key to the Mantrayana, and the Mantrayana was the first stream of the Buddhadharma to fall from the sky into the court of Thothori Nyantsen. Removed uncited claim re: Shambala and the nature of the stone. They were just applying video game references as reality. --[[Special:Contributions/108.9.20.200|108.9.20.200]] ([[User talk:108.9.20.200|talk]]) 17:33, 3 August 2011 (UTC) Changed the description of amber from "fossilized sap" to "fossilized resin" as this is more accurate. [[Special:Contributions/199.67.140.43|199.67.140.43]] ([[User talk:199.67.140.43|talk]]) 19:44, 7 October 2011 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:00, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Removed info== I removed this from the popular culture section, '''In the Assassin's Creed (video game series) universe, the stone is described as being a Piece of Eden created by the First Civilization''', this is the [http://www.computerandvideogames.com/175552/blog/assassins-creed-ending-explained/?page=5 source] I based my info on. — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:L0bc1ty|L0bc1ty]] ([[User talk:L0bc1ty|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/L0bc1ty|contribs]]) 03:23, 10 March 2012 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:00, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Equivalence to Philosopher's Stone == The Philosopher's Stone is capable of turning base metals into gold, and is possibly an elixir of life. This is not at all the equivalent of a "wish fulfilling jewel". Moreover the Western alchemists applied a form of science to their attempts to create the Philosopher's Stone. The Cinatamani was just found. Rather like comparing those who work for a living with those who rely on wining lotto.[[User:Royalcourtier|Royalcourtier]] ([[User talk:Royalcourtier|talk]]) 03:13, 18 April 2015 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:00, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Ligocsicnarf89]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cintamani here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:00, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1210497662 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:00, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Hinduism|importance=Low}} {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=Low}} }} ==Untitled== ''The following appears to be uncited, possibly OR, so moved to talk'' [[User:RJFJR|RJFJR]] ([[User talk:RJFJR|talk]]) 19:08, 17 October 2009 (UTC) Importantly, we now know that crystals are [[Crystal oscillator|resonant substances]] and resonance is key to the Mantrayana, and the Mantrayana was the first stream of the Buddhadharma to fall from the sky into the court of Thothori Nyantsen. Removed uncited claim re: Shambala and the nature of the stone. They were just applying video game references as reality. --[[Special:Contributions/108.9.20.200|108.9.20.200]] ([[User talk:108.9.20.200|talk]]) 17:33, 3 August 2011 (UTC) Changed the description of amber from "fossilized sap" to "fossilized resin" as this is more accurate. [[Special:Contributions/199.67.140.43|199.67.140.43]] ([[User talk:199.67.140.43|talk]]) 19:44, 7 October 2011 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:00, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Removed info== I removed this from the popular culture section, '''In the Assassin's Creed (video game series) universe, the stone is described as being a Piece of Eden created by the First Civilization''', this is the [http://www.computerandvideogames.com/175552/blog/assassins-creed-ending-explained/?page=5 source] I based my info on. — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:L0bc1ty|L0bc1ty]] ([[User talk:L0bc1ty|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/L0bc1ty|contribs]]) 03:23, 10 March 2012 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:00, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Equivalence to Philosopher's Stone == The Philosopher's Stone is capable of turning base metals into gold, and is possibly an elixir of life. This is not at all the equivalent of a "wish fulfilling jewel". Moreover the Western alchemists applied a form of science to their attempts to create the Philosopher's Stone. The Cinatamani was just found. Rather like comparing those who work for a living with those who rely on wining lotto.[[User:Royalcourtier|Royalcourtier]] ([[User talk:Royalcourtier|talk]]) 03:13, 18 April 2015 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:00, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
